title: Cross-framework crosswalk
description: Phase 3: verified relationships between control records across C3A, ECSF, and CADA. A separate linking artifact — does not modify or duplicate any record in c3a.json/ecsf.json/cada.json. Supersedes the unverified data/extracted/ecsf-c3a-hints.json (Phase 2b), which stays as a historical artifact documenting the pre-verification starting point.

source_id.description: Control record id this link is FROM (an ECSF or CADA id in this phase's scope).

target_id.description: Control record id this link is TO. null iff relation is no_counterpart.

relation.description: equivalent: same requirement, different wording. subsumed_by: source is a narrower instance of the (broader) target. partially_covers: target covers part, but not all, of source's substance. related: thematically connected but not a coverage claim. no_counterpart: no record in the target framework addresses this at all (target_id/target_framework null).

justification.description: One-line reasoning for this specific relation, required for every link including no_counterpart (state why nothing corresponds).
